title: Wallpaper
body:
This is a mod that allows you to customize the background image of the game interface, and it has been open-sourced on GitHub.

You can modify the customized background by changing the path option in the mod's configuration file. It is recommended to use the "Configured" mod to make these changes. In addition, you can configure through the configuration file whether to enable the customized background on the main menu and the End Poem screen. By default, the customized background is enabled. You can also configure whether to enable a blur effect when rendering the customized background. By default, the blur effect is not enabled.
